# Open Configurator

> Open-source visual product configurator. Build, customize, and price custom products (bikes, generators, and more) in real time.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview and intro to the configurator platform.
- [Features](/features): Capabilities including real-time pricing, visual customization, and analytics.
- [Products](/products): Browse and configure available product catalog.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for saved configurations and orders.
